input.headline: Thanksgiving travel tips: Best and worst days to fly or drive

raw.headline: Thanksgiving travel tips: Best and worst days to fly or drive

winner: Why did the pilgrim avoid flying on Thanksgiving? Because he heard the worst day to travel was Plymouth Rock-tured Tuesday!

candidates.text: Even turkeys are dreading the traffic on Turkey Day this year.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'turkeys' and 'Turkey Day' are clever and specific, with a surprise twist that ties into the travel theme."}

candidates.text: Why did the pilgrim avoid flying on Thanksgiving? Because he heard the worst day to travel was Plymouth Rock-tured Tuesday!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses a pun on 'Plymouth Rock' and 'rock-tured Tuesday,' which is somewhat clever but forced. It lacks natural flow and the surprise element is weak. The humor is minimal and relies too heavily on a tired holiday reference."}

candidates.text: Why did the pilgrim avoid traveling on Turkey Day? Because he knew it was the fowlest day for flights!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'fowlest' (worst) and 'Turkey Day,' but it's a bit forced and relies heavily on the Thanksgiving/Turkey connection, which may be too obvious for maximum surprise."}

candidates.text: Why don't pilgrims ever go on road trips? Because they prefer flying in mayflies!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the pun on 'mayflies,' but it's a bit forced and lacks clear connection to Thanksgiving travel tips. The reference to pilgrims feels generic and not strongly tied to the topic."}

candidates.text: Which is the busiest day for a peaceful stroll along the highway? Apparently, it's Thanksgiving!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and ties to the headline, but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity. The pun on 'peaceful stroll' versus 'busiest day' is weak and not particularly funny."}
